'''thotawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ulnarward|ulnarward]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-t-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ulnarward|ulnarward]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thotawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thotawithi|thotawithi]] || [[word:thotawiji|thotawiji]] || [[word:thotawishi|thotawishi]] || [[word:thotawiki|thotawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotawuthuthu|thotawuthuthu]] || [[word:thotawujuju|thotawujuju]] || [[word:thotawushushu|thotawushushu]] || [[word:thotawukuku|thotawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotawuthu|thotawuthu]] || [[word:thotawuju|thotawuju]] || [[word:thotawushu|thotawushu]] || [[word:thotawuku|thotawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotawufthuf|thotawufthuf]] || [[word:thotawufjuf|thotawufjuf]] || [[word:thotawufshuf|thotawufshuf]] || [[word:thotawufkuf|thotawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thotawethe|thotawethe]] || [[word:thotaweje|thotaweje]] || [[word:thotaweshe|thotaweshe]] || [[word:thotaweke|thotaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotawothotho|thotawothotho]] || [[word:thotawojojo|thotawojojo]] || [[word:thotawoshosho|thotawoshosho]] || [[word:thotawokoko|thotawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotawotho|thotawotho]] || [[word:thotawojo|thotawojo]] || [[word:thotawosho|thotawosho]] || [[word:thotawoko|thotawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotawofthof|thotawofthof]] || [[word:thotawofjof|thotawofjof]] || [[word:thotawofshof|thotawofshof]] || [[word:thotawofkof|thotawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thotawĂŻfthĂŻf|thotawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thotawĂŻfjĂŻf|thotawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thotawĂŻfshĂŻf|thotawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thotawĂŻfkĂŻf|thotawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thotawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thotawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thotawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thotawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thotawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thotawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thotawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotawĂŻfthĂŻf|thotawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thotawĂŻfjĂŻf|thotawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thotawĂŻfshĂŻf|thotawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thotawĂŻfkĂŻf|thotawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotawĂŻfthĂŻf|thotawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thotawĂŻfjĂŻf|thotawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thotawĂŻfshĂŻf|thotawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thotawĂŻfkĂŻf|thotawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thotawĂŠthĂŠ|thotawĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thotawĂŠjĂŠ|thotawĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thotawĂŠshĂŠ|thotawĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thotawĂŠkĂŠ|thotawĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotawathatha|thotawathatha]] || [[word:thotawajaja|thotawajaja]] || [[word:thotawashasha|thotawashasha]] || [[word:thotawakaka|thotawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotawatha|thotawatha]] || [[word:thotawaja|thotawaja]] || [[word:thotawasha|thotawasha]] || [[word:thotawaka|thotawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotawafthaf|thotawafthaf]] || [[word:thotawafjaf|thotawafjaf]] || [[word:thotawafshaf|thotawafshaf]] || [[word:thotawafkaf|thotawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thotawasha|thotawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thotawshĂ«asha|thotawshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thotawroasha|thotawroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thotawmuasha|thotawmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thotawyaasha|thotawyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothotawnkshĂ«asha|gothotawnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothotawnkroasha|gothotawnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothotawnkmuasha|gothotawnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothotawnkyaasha|gothotawnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thotatawasha|thotatawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thotatawshĂ«asha|thotatawshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thotatawroasha|thotatawroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thotatawmuasha|thotatawmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thotatawyaasha|thotatawyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothotatawnkshĂ«asha|gothotatawnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothotatawnkroasha|gothotatawnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothotatawnkmuasha|gothotatawnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothotatawnkyaasha|gothotatawnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thetĂŠwasha|thetĂŠwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thetĂŠwshĂ«asha|thetĂŠwshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thetĂŠwroasha|thetĂŠwroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thetĂŠwmuasha|thetĂŠwmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thetĂŠwyaasha|thetĂŠwyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothetĂŠwnkshĂ«asha|gothetĂŠwnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothetĂŠwnkroasha|gothetĂŠwnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothetĂŠwnkmuasha|gothetĂŠwnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothetĂŠwnkyaasha|gothetĂŠwnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thotfawasha|thotfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thotfawshĂ«asha|thotfawshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thotfawroasha|thotfawroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thotfawmuasha|thotfawmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thotfawyaasha|thotfawyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothotfawnkshĂ«asha|gothotfawnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothotfawnkroasha|gothotfawnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothotfawnkmuasha|gothotfawnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothotfawnkyaasha|gothotfawnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
